chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 146 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4777/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on MA No.4778/2025 (R/Surety) 23.09.2025 None present for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. This application is filed by applicant Muhammad Siddique seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by the available record, it seems that accused Nazeer Ahmed Lohar, who on 21.02.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original defence savings certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the learned trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 25.02.2025, which though was recalled and the applicant was taken into custody on 07.03.2025, he has subsequently been granted post-arrest bail by this Court on 24.07.2025. All orders are annexed with the application. As such, the surety furnished in this bail application is no more required. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and, in view of the aforesaid position, does not oppose the application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
